name: Linguine with White Clam Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a saucepot.
2. Add oil and heat.
3. Saute garlic and clams in the hot oil mixture over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Stir in parsley, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Simmer for 5-10 minutes.
6. Cook linguine according to package directions; drain well.
7. Return linguine to the pot and add sauce; toss lightly.
8. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
